overall.description: A static scene from a fantasy video game showing a player character in a green cloak standing inside a dimly lit, multi-level wooden apothecary shop. An elderly shopkeeper stands behind a counter filled with bottles and jars, reading from a book under warm lantern light.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden apothecary shop with stacked shelves and hanging lanterns

events.description: interaction prompt UI element appears on screen indicating available dialogue or transaction with shopkeeper

agents.ego_description: player character stands still facing the shopkeeper, occasionally shifting weight and turning head slightly

notable_agents.action: elderly shopkeeper reading from a large book behind the counter, turning pages and gesturing with hands

entered.detail: tall wooden shelving unit filled with glass bottles and jars containing various colored liquids
glass-fronted cabinet on counter displaying merchandise with warm interior lighting
dark wooden shop counter separating the shopkeeper from the customer area
warm amber light fixture hanging from ceiling beam illuminating the shop interior
second level wooden balcony with railing visible above the main floor, lined with additional shelves
wooden ladder leaning against the right wall leading to upper shelving

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place entirely within a cozy, dimly lit wooden apothecary shop. The player character stands facing an elderly shopkeeper who is engrossed in reading a book behind the counter. Warm light from hanging lanterns illuminates shelves packed with bottles and magical items. At approximately seven seconds, an interaction prompt appears, signaling the player can engage with the shopkeeper. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the ambient animations of the NPC as they handle the book and gesture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric focus within a cozy, dimly lit wooden apothecary shop. It begins with the player character facing an elderly shopkeeper who is engrossed in a book behind a counter. As the shopkeeper gestures and handles the book, the warm glow from hanging lanterns continues to illuminate surrounding shelves packed with magical bottles and jars. The scene then shifts slightly in focus as an interaction prompt appears on the screen, signaling the opportunity to engage with the NPC. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the quiet, ambient animations of the shop's interior.
